name: Baileys Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch round cake pan. Cream butter and sugar until smooth. Beat in eggs one at a time. Stir in chocolate syrup, Baileys, and coffee crystals (if using). Mix in flour and chopped pecans. Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool completely on a wire rack.
Dip one end of pecan halves halfway into melted chocolate to coat. Place coated nuts on waxed paper and chill.
For the glaze, add sour cream and Baileys to melted chocolate morsels. Pour over the cooled cake placed on a serving platter, allowing some to drip down the sides. Decorate with additional dipped pecans. Allow topping to set before serving.
